name: dental-qa-app
description: Static dental Q&A learning app development helpers.

scripts.check: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); ['package.json','.devcontainer/devcontainer.json','firebase.json','.firebaserc'].forEach(file => JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(file,'utf8'))); const html=fs.readFileSync('index.html','utf8'); const start='<script type=\"module\">'; const open=html.indexOf(start); const close=html.lastIndexOf('</script>'); if(open<0||close<0||close<=open) throw new Error('module script not found'); const script=html.slice(open+start.length, close); require('child_process').execFileSync(process.execPath,['--check','--input-type=module'],{input:script,stdio:['pipe','inherit','inherit']}); console.log('check OK');"
scripts.test:all: npm run check && npm run test:e2e
